meta.title: Middle East Consultants | Engineering Excellence Since 2002
meta.description: MEC is a leading construction consultancy firm in Egypt with 24+ years of experience in architecture, project management, and construction supervision.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive engineering consultancy solutions tailored to your needs

architecture.title: Architecture & Design
architecture.description: From schematic design to construction documents, we bring your vision to life with innovative and sustainable design solutions.

projectManagement.title: Project Management
projectManagement.description: Expert planning, scheduling, and cost management ensuring successful and timely project delivery.

constructionManagement.title: Construction Management & Supervision
constructionManagement.description: Ensuring the highest standards of quality, safety, and excellence throughout every construction phase.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: A portfolio of excellence across multiple sectors
technicalScopeItems: Topographic surveying using the latest surveying equipment
Structural studies providing cost-effective solutions without compromising safety
MEP systems (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing) and firefighting design
Landscape design for green spaces and aesthetics surrounding the buildings

items.title: Merit University
items.description: A modern campus featuring faculties of Medicine, Physiotherapy, and Pharmacy with cutting-edge open-space design.
items.fullDescription: A massive educational edifice spanning a vast area, designed to be a beacon of education in Upper Egypt. The campus brings together multiple faculties under one cohesive architectural vision.
features: Faculty of Medicine: Administrative buildings and lecture halls equipped with the latest technological facilities
Faculty of Physiotherapy: Includes specialized laboratories and practical training halls
Faculty of Pharmacy: Design that considers safety standards and modern chemical laboratories
items.mecRole: Complete engineering consultancy, architectural design, and execution supervision to ensure compliance with international standards for educational facilities.

items.title: Assiut University
items.description: Consultancy services for university facilities and infrastructure development.
items.fullDescription: A comprehensive development and modernization project for multiple university buildings at Assiut University, one of the oldest and most prestigious universities in Upper Egypt.
features: Structural and architectural design to enhance the efficiency of existing facilities
Focus on accommodating increased student capacity
Facade development and modernization
items.mecRole: Structural and architectural design to improve the efficiency of existing facilities, with a focus on accommodating student density and developing facades.

items.title: Lifer Medical Park
items.description: An integrated medical center with specialized clinics, radiology centers, and laboratories.
items.fullDescription: The first integrated medical complex serving the South Upper Egypt region, designed to provide comprehensive healthcare services under one roof with world-class standards.
features: Specialized clinics with various sizes to accommodate different medical specialties
Advanced radiology centers and diagnostic laboratories
Design compliant with hospital codes for corridors, medical elevators, and fire-fighting systems
items.mecRole: Architectural and interior design (Interior Design) along with medical pathway planning to ensure optimal patient flow and healthcare delivery.

items.title: 3i Pharma
items.description: A pharmaceutical complex with warehousing and distribution facilities meeting international storage standards.
items.fullDescription: A chain of pharmaceutical branches and pharmaceutical storage warehouses designed to meet the highest international standards for drug storage and distribution.
features: Advanced cooling and insulation systems (Cold Chain)
Good Storage Practice (GSP) compliance in structural and mechanical design
Distribution facility optimization for pharmaceutical logistics
items.mecRole: Focus on cooling and insulation systems (Cold Chain) and Good Storage Practice (GSP) standards in structural and mechanical design.

items.title: Crown Key
items.description: A luxury residential compound focused on privacy, comfort, and premium living.
items.fullDescription: A residential compound that aims to introduce a new concept of luxury living, combining modern smart home technology with lush green spaces and premium security services.
features: Residential units with Smart Home systems
Advanced green spaces and landscape design
High-end security services and privacy features
items.mecRole: Master Plan preparation, architectural facade design, and full project management to deliver a premium living experience.

items.title: Heraa Projects
items.description: Residential and commercial tower development in Sohag and Assiut in collaboration with Heraa Company.
items.fullDescription: A collection of residential and commercial administrative towers at strategic locations, developed in collaboration with Heraa Engineering Development Company.
features: Contemporary designs that smartly utilize spaces
Underground parking garages
Commercial areas on the ground floors for mixed-use development
items.mecRole: Contemporary architectural designs that smartly utilize spaces, with underground garages and commercial areas on the ground floors.

items.title: Manqabad Overpass Bridge
items.description: Engineering supervision and structural quality assurance for the Manqabad overpass in Assiut.
items.fullDescription: A national project to alleviate traffic congestion at the northern entrance of Assiut, involving complex deep foundation work and strict quality control.
features: Supervision of deep foundation execution (piling works)
Quality control of concrete and steel materials used
Verification of slope ratios and asphalt specifications per the Egyptian Roads Code
items.mecRole: Engineering supervision on deep foundation execution, concrete and steel quality monitoring, and ensuring compliance with the Egyptian Roads Code.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by industry leaders across Egypt

items.name: Dr. Hani Fathi
items.quote: Honestly, everything was exceptional. I sincerely wish all companies would follow your lead in delivering first-class service and quality.

items.name: Dr. Gamal Qurashi
items.quote: I would like to express my sincere gratitude to the MEC engineering team for their outstanding efforts in development, seamless integration of innovative ideas, and exceptional creativity.

items.name: Eng. Ayman Abu El-Ala
items.quote: We at Heraa Engineering Development express our deep happiness and gratitude for our collaboration with MEC. The teamwork and expertise have greatly contributed to the success of our joint projects.
